Avatar

User or entity avatar for displaying profile images, initials, or placeholder icons. Custom HTML component — no Lyte equivalent.

Basic Figma Synced 2 Types × 3 Shapes × 4 Sizes
Image Avatar — All Sizes
XL (36px)
LG (24px)
SM (16px)
XS (14px)
HTML
<!-- Image Avatar: XL (36px) -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-image zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-base">
  <img src="photo.jpg" alt="User avatar">
</div>

<!-- Image Avatar: LG (24px) -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-image zc-avatar-lg zc-avatar-base">
  <img src="photo.jpg" alt="User avatar">
</div>

<!-- Image Avatar: SM (16px) -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-image zc-avatar-sm zc-avatar-base">
  <img src="photo.jpg" alt="User avatar">
</div>

<!-- Image Avatar: XS (14px) -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-image zc-avatar-xs zc-avatar-base">
  <img src="photo.jpg" alt="User avatar">
</div>
SCSS
.zc-avatar {
  position: relative;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-subtle, #EFF0F1);
  background: var(--zc-color-black-white-surface-white-surface, #FFFFFF);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.zc-avatar-image img {
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
}
Initials Avatar — All Sizes
XL (36px)
AB
LG (24px)
AB
SM (16px)
A
XS (14px)
A
HTML
<!-- Initials Avatar: XL -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-base">AB</div>

<!-- Initials Avatar: LG -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-lg zc-avatar-base">AB</div>

<!-- Initials Avatar: SM -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-sm zc-avatar-base">A</div>
SCSS
.zc-avatar-solid {
  background: var(--zc-color-primary-surface-primary-surface-default, #0D4EF2);
  color: var(--zc-color-black-white-text-white-text, #FFFFFF);
  font-weight: 400;
  font-size: 14px;
}
Border Radius Variants
Minimal (2px)
AB
Base (6px)
AB
Full (Circle)
AB
HTML
<!-- Minimal (2px radius) -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-minimal">AB</div>

<!-- Base (6px radius — default) -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-base">AB</div>

<!-- Full (Circle) -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-full">AB</div>
SCSS
.zc-avatar-minimal { border-radius: 2px; }
.zc-avatar-base    { border-radius: var(--zc-radius-r, 6px); }
.zc-avatar-full    { border-radius: 999px; }
Status Indicator
Active
Away
Offline
Active (Solid)
JD
HTML
<!-- Avatar with Active status -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-image zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-full">
  <img src="photo.jpg" alt="Avatar">
  <span class="zc-avatar-status zc-avatar-status-active"></span>
</div>

<!-- Avatar with Away status -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-image zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-full">
  <img src="photo.jpg" alt="Avatar">
  <span class="zc-avatar-status zc-avatar-status-away"></span>
</div>

<!-- Avatar with Offline status -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-image zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-full">
  <img src="photo.jpg" alt="Avatar">
  <span class="zc-avatar-status zc-avatar-status-offline"></span>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-avatar-status {
  position: absolute;
  width: 8px; height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--zc-color-black-white-surface-white-surface, #FFF);
  bottom: -1px; right: -1px;
}
.zc-avatar-status-active  { background: #078841; }
.zc-avatar-status-away    { background: #E68A00; }
.zc-avatar-status-offline { background: #6B7075; }
All Sizes Overview
AB
AB
A
A
HTML
<!-- XL: 36px -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-full">AB</div>

<!-- LG: 24px -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-lg zc-avatar-full">AB</div>

<!-- SM: 16px -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-sm zc-avatar-full">A</div>

<!-- XS: 14px -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-xs zc-avatar-full">A</div>
Color Variants
Primary
AB
Success
CD
Warning
EF
Danger
GH
Neutral
IJ
HTML
<!-- Primary (default) -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-full">AB</div>

<!-- Success -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-success zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-full">CD</div>

<!-- Warning -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-warning zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-full">EF</div>

<!-- Danger -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-danger zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-full">GH</div>

<!-- Neutral -->
<div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-neutral zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-full">IJ</div>
Avatar Group (Stacked)
Group (XL)
+3
Group (LG)
+2
HTML
<!-- Avatar Group (stacked, right-to-left) -->
<div class="zc-avatar-group">
  <div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-solid zc-avatar-neutral zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-full">+3</div>
  <div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-image zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-full">
    <img src="photo1.jpg" alt="">
  </div>
  <div class="zc-avatar zc-avatar-image zc-avatar-xl zc-avatar-full">
    <img src="photo2.jpg" alt="">
  </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-avatar-group {
  display: inline-flex;
  flex-direction: row-reverse;
}
.zc-avatar-group .zc-avatar {
  margin-left: -8px;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #FFFFFF;
}
.zc-avatar-group .zc-avatar:last-child {
  margin-left: 0;
}
